text: Bitcoin and Ethereum have both dropped roughly 5% in 24 hours, signaling a broad risk-off move across major assets, while smaller-cap names like Solana have suffered steeper losses. The Fear & Greed Index sits at 15 (extreme fear) despite rising slightly over the week, suggesting sellers remain in control and capitulation may still be unfolding. Bitcoin dominance holding steady at 56% with $90B in daily volume indicates liquidity is present, but the consistent 5% declines across the board point to coordinated selling rather than rotation.
